children.heading: .—Form of Records
children.label: a .—Form of Records
children.text: The Secretary or the Board, as applicable, may prescribe the form of records required to be prepared or compiled under this subchapter by carriers and brokers, including records related to movement of traffic and receipts and expenditures of money.
inspect and examine the lands, buildings, and equipment of a carrier or broker; and

children.label: A
children.text: a carrier, broker, or association; and

children.label: B
children.text: a person controlling, controlled by, or under common control with a carrier if the Secretary or Board, as applicable, considers inspection relevant to that person’s relation to, or transaction with, that carrier.

children.heading: .—Period for Preservation of Records
children.label: c .—Period for Preservation of Records
children.text: The Secretary or Board, as applicable, may prescribe the time period during which operating, accounting, and financial records must be preserved by carriers and brokers.
